title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 213.112 - Applicability
text:
213.112.  Applicability. — Legally permissible actions pursuant to section 441.020 are subject to the provisions of this chapter only if a primary motive for the section 441.020 action is not any of the factors listed in section 441.020.
(L. 1998 S.B. 786 § 1, A.L. 1999 H.B. 741)
